items.name: rules_template
items.description: If using CLINE/RooCode/Cursor/Windsurf Setup these rules. Usable for newbies riding AI wave and experienced folks both . Combines: (1) Memory,(2) Reasoning into subtasks (3) Prompts for best practices.

items.name: system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools-chinese

items.name: agent-security-scanner-mcp
items.description: Security scanner MCP server for AI coding agents. Prompt injection firewall, package hallucination detection (4.3M+ packages), 1000+ vulnerability rules with AST & taint analysis, auto-fix.

items.name: promptstack
items.description: A searchable collection of AI prompts and code gen cursor rules, for bolt.new, loveable, windsurf, trae, to enhance your workflow for developers.

items.name: LynxPrompt
items.description: Self-hosted & federated platform for AI IDE/Tools Rules and Commands via WebUI & CLI - Generate, browse, store, share AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and more

items.name: ajisai
items.description: Simple preset manager for AI Coding Agents.  Package rule and prompt configurations, then deploy to multiple projects.

items.name: awesome-skills-hub
items.description: A professional package manager for AI IDE skills & rules. Centralize your prompts and sync across Antigravity, Cursor, Windsurf, and Claude with "Write Once, Link Everywhere" simplicity.

items.name: engine_context
items.description: Advanced agent rules and prompt templates for AI coding assistants, focused on planning, security, memory-bank documentation, and approval-driven workflows. Designed for use with Claude Code, Cursor, VSCode, GitHub Copilot, WindSurf, TRAE IDE, ZED IDE, and other AI-powered development tools.

items.name: PromptyDumpty
items.description: PromptyDumpty is a lightweight, universal package manager for AI coding assistant artifacts (prompts, instructions, rules, workflows, etc.). It lets you install and manage prompt packages across different AI coding assistants like GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, Windsurf, and more.

items.name: PromptForge
items.description: Craft reusable AI prompts + rules; sync across Cursor, CLINE, RooCode, Windsurf.

items.description: A production-ready, reusable prompt pack for Windsurf IDE that provides workspace-scoped AI agent guidance through Rules and reusable task automation via Workflows.
